movies.overview: Police pull over a woman who claims she just gave birth. But the baby — and the blood — aren't hers. Twisted lies unravel in this true-crime documentary.
movies.title: Maternal Instinct

movies.overview: Footballer, entrepreneur, fan favorite and true community hero — Lukas Podolski reflects on his journey and what comes next in this intimate documentary.
movies.title: Poldi

movies.overview: A young mother is killed in broad daylight on London's Wimbledon Common — in front of her toddler. This documentary examines the yearslong murder case.
movies.title: The Murder of Rachel Nickell

movies.original_title: The 51st AFI Life Achievement Award: A Tribute to Eddie Murphy
movies.overview: Follows the 51st AFI Life Achievement Award ceremony honoring Eddie Murphy for his five-decade career in film, television and stand-up comedy.
movies.title: The 51st AFI Life Achievement Award: A Tribute to Eddie Murphy

movies.overview: Why was Alex Murdaugh's conviction overturned? The debut of "Instadocs" digs into stunning allegations of jury interference in his double murder trial.
movies.title: Instadocs: Alex Murdaugh, Unconvicted

movies.overview: It's time to hit the dancefloor as pop superstar Kylie Minogue shares a vibrant, exclusive behind-the-scenes look at her smash 2025 Tension World Tour.
movies.title: Kylie: Tension Tour Live

movies.overview: This is the story of Vinnie Jones's rise, fall, and comeback against odds – and red cards – from one of football's most notorious hard men to FA cup winner.
movies.title: Untold UK: Vinnie Jones

movies.original_title: Untold UK: Liverpool's Miracle of Istanbul
movies.overview: At half-time in the 2005 champion league final Liverpool were 3-0 down. What happened next made football history -​ as players recall in this documentary.
movies.title: Untold UK: Liverpool's Miracle of Istanbul

movies.overview: A teen slams her car into a building, killing her boyfriend and his friend. What seems like a tragic accident becomes a murder case.
movies.title: The Crash

movies.original_title: Le Bus : Les Bleus en grève
movies.overview: This documentary revisits the French football team's controversial 2010 World Cup and the bus strike that sparked global headlines and national outrage.
movies.title: The Bus: A French Football Mutiny

movies.overview: From part-time footballer to Premier League legend, this is the story of Jamie Vardy's unprecedented path and his rise to the top against all odds.
movies.title: Jamie Vardy

movies.overview: Martin Short looks back on a life fueled by joy in this documentary with classic clips, fresh interviews and star-studded, never-before-seen home movies.
movies.title: Marty, Life Is Short

movies.overview: Follows Brazil's journey to winning its fourth World Cup in 1994, featuring interviews with players and unseen behind-the-scenes footage from the tournament.
movies.title: USA 94: Brazil's Return to Glory

movies.original_title: Dibu Martínez: El pibe que ataja el tiempo
movies.overview: Mixing animation and interviews, this film follows Emi Martínez's journey to becoming a legendary goalkeeper, from small-town Argentina to world glory.
movies.title: Emi Martínez: The Kid Who Stops Time

movies.overview: Lainey Wilson redefines what it means to be a modern country star while exploring her struggles and triumphs at a pivotal career moment.
movies.title: Lainey Wilson: Keepin' Country Cool

movies.original_title: Untold: The Shooting at Hawthorne Hill
movies.overview: A retired Olympic equestrian takes on a new dressage student at his idyllic farm in New Jersey. Over time, tensions mount between the two, leading to 911 calls, cryptic social media posts, and accusations of spying. The feud culminates in a shocking act of violence and a trial that rocked the prestigious and sophisticated world of dressage.
movies.title: Untold: The Shooting at Hawthorne Hill

movies.original_title: 戦いの向こう 侍たちの記録 2026 WORLD BASEBALL CLASSIC
movies.overview: The pressure of glory. A shocking loss.​ Raw locker room talk. Go behind the scenes into their reality as Samurai​ Japan's camera keeps rolling.
movies.title: Beyond the Game: Samurai 2026 WORLD BASEBALL CLASSIC

movies.original_title: Yiya Murano: Muerte a la hora del té
movies.overview: Yiya Murano poisoned her friends to cover up scams in 1970s Argentina and became a dark figure in popular culture. Freed in the 1990s, she reappeared as a pop icon. Today, her son Martín seeks to reveal her true face.
movies.title: Yiya Murano: Death at Tea Time

movies.original_title: A Gorilla Story: Told by David Attenborough
movies.overview: Veteran naturalist Sir David Attenborough tells the story of a remarkable group of gorillas, from his first encounter in the '70s to the present day.
movies.title: A Gorilla Story: Told by David Attenborough

movies.overview: A documentary that chronicles the luxurious life of the Duchess of Alba, Cayetana Fitz-James Stuart; one of the most significant figures of the Spanish aristocracy of the 20th century
movies.title: Cayetana: The Duchess of all

movies.overview: Volatile players. Criminal charges. National headlines. Portland's championship-caliber NBA team implodes spectacularly in this unflinching documentary.
movies.title: Untold: Jail Blazers

movies.overview: Magnus Carlsen, widely regarded as the greatest chess player of all time, is challenged by Hans Niemann, a rising star who capitalizes on the meteoric growth of online chess. Niemann’s ascension culminated in an epic, controversy-shrouded victory over Carlsen at the 2022 Sinquefield Cup, which eventually led to allegations and revelations of cheating. Determined to clear his name, Niemann fights his way back to the top of the chess world, setting the stage for a high-stakes rematch with Carlsen in 2024.
movies.title: Untold: Chess Mates

movies.original_title: Untold: The Death & Life of Lamar Odom
movies.overview: This documentary traces the life of Lamar Odom, from his rise to NBA fame and marriage to Khloé Kardashian to his near-fatal overdose in a Nevada brothel.
movies.title: Untold: The Death & Life of Lamar Odom

movies.overview: They're back! BTS gathers in LA to record their album "Arirang" in this documentary offering unprecedented access to the band as they enter a new era.
movies.title: BTS: THE RETURN

last_episode_to_air.name: Now or Never
last_episode_to_air.overview: With Norway's World Cup dream hanging by a thread, Ståle and his squad travel to the iconic San Siro for a decisive clash that could end a 26-year wait.

tv_shows.name: Norway: The Dark Horse
tv_shows.overview: After 26 years of tournament drought, Norway's 2026 World Cup hopes were next to nil. But what followed rekindled belief.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 3
last_episode_to_air.overview: Despite damning accounts from former Neverland workers, key witnesses turn the tide in Jackson's favor — but the trial nevertheless leaves deep wounds.

tv_shows.name: Michael Jackson: The Verdict
tv_shows.overview: Told by key players who were inside the courtroom, this comprehensive documentary dissects the trial of Michael Jackson and his complex legacy.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Told by key players who were inside the courtroom, this comprehensive documentary dissects the trial of Michael Jackson and his complex legacy.

last_episode_to_air.name: I'm Not Dead
last_episode_to_air.overview: As the final looms and pressure mounts for Brazil to bring the cup home, the star player isn't in top form — but he's definitely not dead.

tv_shows.name: Brazil '70: The Third Star
tv_shows.overview: In 1970, the Brazilian national team took the field with big dreams and an even bigger challenge: to become the first three-time world champions.

last_episode_to_air.name: No Fear
last_episode_to_air.overview: Throughout his career, even when the odds were stacked against him, Rafa refused to give up — and he keeps fighting as the end edges inevitably closer.

tv_shows.name: Rafa
tv_shows.overview: RAFA retraces Nadal's remarkable journey with cinematic scope, combining testimonies from those who know him best—on and off the court—with unseen moments that reveal what lies behind the legend.

last_episode_to_air.name: James vs James
last_episode_to_air.overview: James tries to reset his career and prove he still belongs. Rejoining Colombia renews his fire, and a long-held Copa dream finally comes back into view.

tv_shows.name: James.
tv_shows.overview: James Rodríguez, Colombia's legendary No. 10, shares details of his journey to football's elite and the game's biggest stage.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 3
last_episode_to_air.overview: Riding high on a new raft of pop hits, Kylie prepares to headline Glastonbury — until a shocking diagnosis turns her life and career upside down.

tv_shows.name: Kylie
tv_shows.overview: A look at the life of British pop star Kylie Minogue, who opens her personal archives and reflects on a career in which she has sold 80 million records and reinvented herself, and by extension pop, several times. Home movies, personal photographs and new interviews reveal the picture, as Kylie addresses how she’s faced public scrutiny, personal loss and illness.

last_episode_to_air.name: Part 3
last_episode_to_air.overview: Torn between doing the right thing and protecting the man she can't walk away from, Caroline spirals as she desperately tries to avoid the witness stand.

tv_shows.name: Should I Marry a Murderer?
tv_shows.overview: In 2020, pathologist Caroline Muirhead's fiancé, Scottish farmer Alexander 'Sandy' McKellar, confessed to her that he and his twin brother Robert had killed cyclist Tony Parsons in a 2017 hit-and-run on the A82 near Bridge of Orchy and buried the body on the Auch Estate.

seasons.name: Miniseries
seasons.overview: In 2020, pathologist Caroline Muirhead's fiancé, Scottish farmer Alexander 'Sandy' McKellar, confessed to her that he and his twin brother Robert had killed cyclist Tony Parsons in a 2017 hit-and-run on the A82 near Bridge of Orchy and buried the body on the Auch Estate.

last_episode_to_air.name: Hulk vs Terry
last_episode_to_air.overview: Forced to branch out, Hulk finds himself mired in controversy. He emerges with outspoken views, but his death leaves the world contemplating his legacy.

tv_shows.name: Hulk Hogan: Real American
tv_shows.overview: Before he was Hulk Hogan, he was Terry Bollea. Uncover the man behind the legend in this unfiltered documentary featuring his very last interview.

last_episode_to_air.name: Compost
last_episode_to_air.overview: From scents to science, Zach and his kid crew dig into composting, as an expert breaks down the dos and don'ts of making healthy soil.

tv_shows.name: This Is a Gardening Show
tv_shows.overview: Zach Galifianakis digs into the world of gardening, interviewing curious kids and eccentric experts in a funny, oddball celebration of the food we eat.

last_episode_to_air.name: Who Said I Was Finished?
last_episode_to_air.overview: Ronaldinho returns to Brazil to achieve a final goal in his career and reconnect with his roots. He finds unprecedented support during difficult times.

tv_shows.name: Ronaldinho: The One and Only
tv_shows.overview: This series follows the life and career of Brazilian soccer star Ronaldinho, tracing his journey from young prodigy to global sports icon.

last_episode_to_air.name: I See That Girl in Third Person
last_episode_to_air.overview: A dramatic raid puts Sam behind bars, where he orchestrates a brazen kidnapping. With Christine's support, his ex-followers begin to rebuild their lives.

tv_shows.name: Trust Me: The False Prophet
tv_shows.overview: In this true-crime documentary, a cult expert and filmmaker infiltrate a polygamist sect to expose a self-proclaimed prophet and bring him to justice.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 3
last_episode_to_air.overview: After years building her case, gathering statements and facing multiple disappointments, Gabrielle reaches Manuel's trial worn down but unwavering.

tv_shows.name: The Predator of Seville
tv_shows.overview: For years, Manuel Blanco was known among international students as “Manu White”, a friendly guide who organised cheap trips across Spain. But behind that image lay a far darker story. The case came to light when several young women began to connect experiences of abuse that had previously seemed unrelated.

last_episode_to_air.name: The Limit
last_episode_to_air.overview: Political pressure and corruption delay the investigation in the case of Ariadna Fernanda. Sayuri faces a shift in her priorities and takes on a new challenge.

tv_shows.name: The Prosecutor
tv_shows.overview: This raw docuseries is about the head of the new Femicide Investigation Unit in Mexico City, a department established to stop violence against women.

last_episode_to_air.name: IÑAKI GODOY INTERVIEWS MR. ODA
last_episode_to_air.overview: Iñaki Godoy, who plays Luffy in ONE PIECE, meets with the legendary creator, Mr. Oda, to discuss his first set visit. The conversation takes place in Japanese, and offers a look into the future of the series. The Grand Line… here we come!

tv_shows.name: ONE PIECE BONUS CONTENT
tv_shows.overview: Take a voyage behind the scenes in this showcase of the effects, Easter eggs and jaw-dropping stunts that brought Season 2 to life.

last_episode_to_air.name: Endgame
last_episode_to_air.overview: The Murdoch empire's influence is unmatched. While James and Lachlan grapple for control, Rupert makes ruthless decisions to preserve his legacy.

tv_shows.name: Dynasty: The Murdochs
tv_shows.overview: Offers an unprecedented look at one the world’s most powerful families at a crossroads, as its patriarch, Rupert Murdoch, makes one last play to ensure his legacy at all costs.

last_episode_to_air.name: Cosplay Mode Activated
last_episode_to_air.overview: These fans came to play! The world of "KPop Demon Hunters" inspired an outpouring of creativity — and some truly amazing transformations.

tv_shows.name: KPop Demon Hunters Bonus Content
tv_shows.overview: For the fans... from the fans! This collection of "KPop Demon Hunters" fan-video moments rounds up must-see clips to watch again and again.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: For the fans... from the fans! This collection of "KPop Demon Hunters" fan-video moments rounds up must-see clips to watch again and again.

last_episode_to_air.name: The Criminal Influencer
last_episode_to_air.overview: Another recent incident illuminates Dinamita Montilla's dark past, while a discovery sheds new light on Esther's case and brings her family some answers.

tv_shows.name: The TikTok Killer
tv_shows.overview: When Esther vanishes without a trace, her family is able to piece together her last movements thanks to José Jurado Montilla, a traveler who journeys across Spain sharing heartfelt videos of his trips on his TikTok account. But “Dynamite” Montilla – the last person to have been with Esther – hides a dark past

last_episode_to_air.name: Fall
last_episode_to_air.overview: Dinosaurs rule the entire planet, with T. rex as the most deadly. But as the continents split and drift, danger lurks far away in the depths of space.

tv_shows.name: The Dinosaurs
tv_shows.overview: From the first dinosaurs to the last, this epic documentary series examines their 165 million years on Earth and the forces that shaped their evolution.
tv_shows.tagline: Take an epic journey into a lost world.

last_episode_to_air.name: Nichlas
last_episode_to_air.overview: The suspect's friends are left reeling at the shocking arrest — and are forced to reassess their feelings towards the person they thought they knew.

tv_shows.name: A Friend, a Murderer
tv_shows.overview: A Danish town feared a serial criminal for eight years. When caught, Amanda, Nichlas and Kiri discovered the perpetrator was their close friend who'd committed assaults, kidnappings and murder while spending time with them.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 6
last_episode_to_air.overview: After a messy soft launch, Gordon's team have issues to fix — and just 12 hours till guests arrive. Can they turn up the heat when it matters the most?

tv_shows.name: Being Gordon Ramsay
tv_shows.overview: Follow Gordon Ramsay over 9 months in the lead up to his biggest restaurant venture to date: the opening of 5 culinary experiences in London's 22 Bishopsgate, the City of London's tallest building.

last_episode_to_air.name: Rooting for You
last_episode_to_air.overview: As ratings slide, the show makes drastic changes. Tyra, the judges, and the models all confront what comes next when the "ANTM" era comes to a close.

tv_shows.name: Reality Check: Inside America's Next Top Model
tv_shows.original_name: Reality Check: Inside America's Next Top Model
tv_shows.overview: What started as a glamorous launchpad for aspiring models became a pop-culture juggernaut defined by explosive drama, public meltdowns, and controversies that still fuel viral moments today.
tv_shows.tagline: The definitive documentary about America's Next Top Model.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 3
last_episode_to_air.overview: The top contenders face off at the Grand Prix final in Japan. With the Olympic Winter Games coming soon, who will be the favorite to win gold?

tv_shows.name: Glitter & Gold: Ice Dancing
tv_shows.overview: Delves into competitive ice dance's intense world, where deep partnerships, total dedication, and raw emotions merge in the pursuit of Olympic gold.

last_episode_to_air.name: Take That (3)
last_episode_to_air.overview: The band embark on their reunion tour without one of their original members. Can they put their past behind them - and what does their future hold?

tv_shows.name: Take That
tv_shows.overview: The story of one of the greatest boy bands in UK history. For more than 30 years, they have brought us hit after hit, 12 of which became UK number ones.

seasons.name: Limited Series
seasons.overview: From their early beginnings as five piece formed in Manchester to becoming pop superstars, relive the camaraderie, chaos, and resilience that fueled their meteoric rise, dramatic split, and one of the greatest comebacks in British music history. Told in their own words, this is the deeply personal and definitive story of Take That.

last_episode_to_air.name: The Master of Money
last_episode_to_air.overview: After life in jail and ruined relationships, it seems all the cards are stacked against Corona. Can the king hold onto his crown in the modern era?

tv_shows.name: Paparazzi King
tv_shows.overview: Explore the life and career of paparazzi king Fabrizio Corona, reflecting Italy's recent history of scandals and social change.

seasons.name: Limited Series
seasons.overview: The five-part docuseries about the tabloid life of Fabrizio Corona, a notorious criminal from Italy, sums up the absolute downfall that the country’s morals, ethics, and most importantly, mainstream media have experienced in recent years.
